AGENTS.md.purpose: verify agent instruction routing is visible to the audit

action.yml.purpose: verify the root GitHub composite action metadata and audit command wiring

agent/MASTER_PLAN.md.command: cargo run -p jankurai -- lane . --changed agent/MASTER_PLAN.md --out target/jankurai/master-plan-proof.json --md target/jankurai/master-plan-proof.md
agent/MASTER_PLAN.md.purpose: verify master plan routing selects the smallest proof lane for agent guidance

.gitignore.purpose: verify workspace ignore policy does not hide canonical artifacts

.gitleaksignore.purpose: verify approved secret-scan exceptions stay narrow and documented

.gitleaks.toml.purpose: verify secret-scan allowlists stay narrow and documented

Cargo.toml.command: cargo test -p jankurai && cargo run -p jankurai -- versions

Cargo.lock.command: cargo test -p jankurai && cargo run -p jankurai -- versions

README.md.purpose: verify root workspace routing remains audit-visible

README-jankurai-scaffold.md.purpose: verify generated scaffold guidance remains audit-visible

LICENSE.purpose: verify public license file remains routed and audit-visible

CONTRIBUTING.md.purpose: verify contributor workflow remains routed and audit-visible

SECURITY.md.purpose: verify public security reporting guidance stays aligned with the security lane

CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md.purpose: verify public conduct guidance remains routed and audit-visible

SUPPORT.md.purpose: verify public support guidance remains routed and audit-visible

CHANGELOG.md.purpose: verify public release notes remain routed and audit-visible

.github/.purpose: verify CI and GitHub instruction surfaces

CODEOWNERS.purpose: verify code ownership routing stays aligned with the owner map

.pre-commit-config.yaml.purpose: verify pre-commit gates mirror CI quality gates

scripts/.purpose: verify support scripts stay reproducible and produce expected outputs

ops/.purpose: verify ops/ci/*.sh lanes still run the same gates CI executes

ops/git-hooks/.purpose: verify the mandatory pre-push gate stays in sync with CI

rust-toolchain.toml.purpose: verify the pinned Rust toolchain installs cleanly

.tool-versions.purpose: verify pinned tool versions match what ops/ci installs

docs/ci-local.md.purpose: verify the local-CI documentation stays aligned with the doctor surface

ops/.purpose: verify ops routing remains visible to the audit

agent/.purpose: verify machine-readable maps and policy remain scannable

agent/coverage-sources.toml.command: cargo test -p jankurai --test coverage_audit_smoke && just score
agent/coverage-sources.toml.purpose: verify coverage evidence source routing and score import

agent/zyal/.command: cargo test -p jankurai --test zyal_audit && just score
agent/zyal/.purpose: verify canonical ZYAL runbooks stay under agent/zyal and only use the .zyal extension

.jankurai/postmortems/.purpose: verify durable postmortem records and read-only views remain schema-bound

tips/phases/logs/.command: cargo run -p jankurai -- lane . --changed tips/phases/logs/README.txt --out target/jankurai/phase-proof.json --md target/jankurai/phase-proof.md
tips/phases/logs/.purpose: verify phase logs remain routed as tracked append-only agent history

docs/.purpose: verify docs remain agent-readable and routed

docs/COVERAGE_*.md.purpose: verify coverage evidence docs remain routed through the score lane

conformance/.purpose: verify seed conformance fixtures and expected decisions remain present

examples/perfect-web-api-db/.purpose: verify the reference platform scaffold stays machine-readable

examples/legacy-node-api/.command: cargo run -p jankurai -- migrate examples/legacy-node-api --json target/jankurai/migration/node.json
examples/legacy-node-api/.purpose: verify migration analysis can classify the legacy Node fixture

schemas/.command: cargo test -p jankurai && npm --workspace @jankurai/ux-qa run build
schemas/.purpose: verify schema-carrying Rust and TypeScript reports still compile

schemas/coverage-*.schema.json.purpose: verify coverage evidence schemas and fixtures

contracts/.purpose: verify contract source guidance remains audit-visible

db/.purpose: verify database policy and migration root remains routed

docs/tuiwright.md.purpose: verify the Tuiwright docs stay aligned with the TUI test lane

db/migrations/.purpose: verify migration inventory and liability evidence when SQL migrations change

crates/jankurai/.command: cargo test -p jankurai && cargo run -p jankurai -- versions
crates/jankurai/.purpose: verify the audit package compiles and still emits JSON/Markdown

crates/jankurai/src/audit/save_gate.rs.command: cargo test -p jankurai --test audit_file_save_gate && cargo test -p jankurai --lib audit::save_gate
crates/jankurai/src/audit/save_gate.rs.purpose: verify the single-file save-gate delta classification and verdict mapping

crates/jankurai/src/commands/audit_file..purpose: verify the jankurai audit-file command surface, candidate sources, formats, and exit codes

crates/jankurai-guard/.purpose: verify the guarded-filesystem watcher backend, enforcement (revert/quarantine/poison), PTY injection, transaction state machine, and audit client

crates/jankurai/src/commands/coverage.rs.command: cargo test -p jankurai --test coverage_audit_smoke && cargo test -p jankurai

crates/jankurai/src/audit/coverage.rs.command: cargo test -p jankurai --test coverage_audit_smoke && cargo test -p jankurai --lib audit::coverage
crates/jankurai/src/audit/coverage.rs.purpose: verify coverage parsers and evidence normalization

crates/jankurai/src/audit/analyzers/tuiw.command: cargo test -p jankurai --test ux_qa_audit_ingest_smoke && cargo test -p jankurai --test report_compatibility_guard
crates/jankurai/src/audit/analyzers/tuiw.purpose: verify Tuiwright evidence detection and rendered UX summary output

crates/jankurai/tests/fixtures/tuiwright.purpose: verify the checked-in Tuiwright audit fixtures for full and gap coverage cases

crates/jankurai/src/commands/postmortem..purpose: verify the durable postmortem record surface and read-only list/show/read views

crates/jankurai/src/commands/doctor.rs.purpose: verify severity-discipline prose detection and trailer suppression

crates/jankurai/tests/postmortem_smoke.r.purpose: verify postmortem record storage, listing, showing, and reading

crates/jankurai/tests/doctor_severity.rs.purpose: verify catastrophic prose, trailer suppression, and bare critical false-positive guards

crates/jankurai/tests/fixtures/postmorte.purpose: verify durable postmortem fixture records and failure-mode enum coverage

crates/jankurai/tests/language_bad_behav.purpose: verify the language bad-behavior fixtures, catalog docs, and fixed-executable false-positive suppression

crates/jankurai/tests/web_security_and_r.purpose: verify web security and repo-rot detector findings, caps, advisories, and false-positive guards

crates/jankurai/tests/badge_schema_smoke.purpose: verify badge JSON validates against the README badge schema

crates/jankurai/tests/security_lane_wrap.purpose: verify the security lane wrapper records required tool failures and exit codes

crates/jankurai/tests/fixtures/language_.purpose: verify the language bad-behavior fixture corpus and catalog docs

crates/jankurai-proofbind/.purpose: verify semantic surface routing and proof obligation binding

crates/tuiwright/.purpose: verify the Tuiwright PTY, locator, renderer, and trace library

crates/tuiwright-cli/.purpose: verify the Tuiwright CLI stays aligned with the core test lane

package.json.command: npm ci && npm --workspace @jankurai/ux-qa run build && npm --workspace @jankurai/ux-qa run test
package.json.purpose: verify the npm workspace and UX QA runtime

package-lock.json.command: npm ci && npm --workspace @jankurai/ux-qa run build && npm --workspace @jankurai/ux-qa run test

examples/tuiwright-demo/.purpose: verify the demo TUI stays covered by the Tuiwright proof lane

tools/jankurai-hooks/.purpose: verify hook receipts-only behavior and hook installation wiring

tools/jankurai-rust/.purpose: verify the Rust witness helper remains routed and generated by init

tips/.purpose: verify upgrade and feedback source material remains routed into the standard

agent_talk.md.purpose: agent coordination file; scored as workspace documentation
